titleStmt.title: SII 15.242: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 242. (B.K. No. 65 of 1928-29.) SŪḶIBHĀVI, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone pillar in the Tuḷajābhavāni temple.

This is dated the cyclic year Viśvāvasu, Māgha-amāvāsye, Monday. The said year, falling in the regime of Vīra-Bijjaḷa and Vīra-Vikrama of the Sinda family, corresponds to 1185-86 A.D. The equivalent of the date would be 1186 A.D., February 21, the weekday being Friday. If, however, Viśvāvasu is a mistake for Parābhava, the details correspond to 1187 A.D., February 9, Monday, f.d.t. °31. This seems to be the intended date.

It records a gift of land for maintaining the sluice of a tank by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Sinda Vīra-Bijjaḷa and Vīra-Vikramāditya. In the latter part of the record which is damaged is registered another gift by two toll officers of Kisukāḍu Nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī
manumahāmaṁraḷēsvara sā
hasōttuṁga bhujabaḷabhīma vī
ra bijjaladēvarasaruṁ vīra vikramādi

[Ūra] paṁnāya hejjuṁka

tu vikramādityadēvarasa
kēśavadēvara Agrasanada brā

Digital edition of SII 15.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
